q: What is the JJU Online Voting System?
a: The JJU Online Voting System is a secure and convenient platform designed to facilitate the student union elections at Jigjiga University.
Voting is restricted to officially registered students of Jigjiga University who have valid credentials.
Voting will be available from the scheduled start date and will remain open until the end date, after which no further votes will be accepted.

q: What happens if the internet disconnects while voting?
a: If a connection is lost before the vote is successfully submitted, the vote will not be recorded. The user must reconnect and cast their vote again.
All votes are securely encrypted and anonymized, ensuring that no one can trace a vote back to an individual voter.
